baseImage.prompt: Placeholder only for schema compatibility. This config runs a simplified Kling reference-to-video attempt from the storyboard reference only.

storyboard.title: Gentle Giant Cinderella Kling Storyboard Only Video
storyboard.prompt: Use @Image1 as the exact 12-panel storyboard reference and convert it into a sincere gothic fairytale trailer in 15 seconds. Follow the beats in order: soot-black kitchen endurance, oppressive household above, delicate cup repair, invitation through smoke, broken mirror wish, chores collapse, industrial fairy-godmother light, ash-and-silk transformation, tiny glass slipper in enormous palm, concrete-and-crystal ballroom entrance, restrained serious dance, final spotlight on the tiny slipper. Main character is a fictional hulking gentle giant Cinderella figure: broad shoulders, powerful arms, huge careful hands, heavy grounded body weight, tender exhausted presence. Brutalist palace, wet stone, soot, steam, low-key cinematic lighting, fabric and ash motion. No celebrity likeness, no Dave Bautista face, no copied tattoos, no wrestling ring, no Disney/franchise costume, no comedy mugging, no readable text or logos, no floating feet.

clips.name: placeholder
